report_type.description: The field 'report_type' indicates the type ('type': http://purl.org/dc/terms/type) of report ('report': http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000088) generated by the EnzyWizard-Mut-Clean software ('software': https://schema.org/SoftwareApplication).

amino_acid_substitution.description: The field 'amino_acid_substitution' indicates the amino acid substitution ('amino acid substitution': http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/SO_0001606) in the original protein structure ('protein structure': http://edamontology.org/data_1537), using one-letter codes ('one-letter code': https://iupac.qmul.ac.uk/AminoAcid/A2021.html) to represent.

cleaned_amino_acid_substitution.description: The field 'cleaned_amino_acid_substitution' indicates the amino acid substitution ('amino acid substitution': http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/SO_0001606) in the cleaned protein structure ('protein structure': http://edamontology.org/data_1537), using one-letter codes ('one-letter code': https://iupac.qmul.ac.uk/AminoAcid/A2021.html) to represent.

wild_type_residue_mapping_old_to_new.description: The field 'wild_type_residue_mapping_old_to_new' indicates the mapping of residues ('residue': http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/GENO_0000782) derived from the original wild-type protein structure ('wild-type': http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/FBcv_0000348; 'protein structure': http://edamontology.org/data_1537) to the cleaned wild-type protein structure.

old_residue.description: The field 'old_residue' indicates the residue ('residue': http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/GENO_0000782) in the original protein structure ('protein structure': http://edamontology.org/data_1537).

residue_index.description: The field 'residue_index' indicates the index ('index': http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/NCIT_C25390 ) of residues ('residue': http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/GENO_0000782 ).

residue_name.description: The field 'residue_name' indicates the name ('name': http://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/name ) of residues ('residue': http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/GENO_0000782 ), using one-letter codes ('one-letter code': https://iupac.qmul.ac.uk/AminoAcid/A2021.html) to represent.

hydrogen_atom_count.description: The field 'hydrogen_atom_count' indicates the count ('count': http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/STATO_0000047 ) of hydrogen atoms ('hydrogen': http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CHEBI_18276; 'atom': http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CHMO_0001075 ) in the residue ('residue': http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/GENO_0000782 ).

new_residue.description: The field 'new_residue' indicates the residue ('residue': http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/GENO_0000782) in the cleaned protein structure ('protein structure': http://edamontology.org/data_1537).

residue_index.description: The field 'residue_index' indicates the index ('index': http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/NCIT_C25390 ) of residues ('residue': http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/GENO_0000782 ).

residue_name.description: The field 'residue_name' indicates the name ('name': http://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/name ) of residues ('residue': http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/GENO_0000782 ), using one-letter code ('one-letter code': https://iupac.qmul.ac.uk/AminoAcid/A2021.html) to represent.

hydrogen_atom_count.description: The field 'hydrogen_atom_count' indicates the count ('count': http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/STATO_0000047 ) of hydrogen ('hydrogen': http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CHEBI_18276 ) atoms ('atom': http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CHMO_0001075 ) in the residue ('residue': http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/GENO_0000782 ).

wild_type_clean_statistics.description: The field 'wild_type_clean_statistics' indicates the summary cleaning statistics ('statistics': http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/STATO_0000039 ) of the wild-type protein structure ('wild-type': http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/FBcv_0000348; 'protein structure': http://edamontology.org/data_1537).

removed_heterogen_count.description: The field 'removed_heterogen_count' indicates the count ('count': http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/STATO_0000047 ) of removed heterogens ('heterogen': https://www.wwpdb.org/documentation/file-format-content/format33/sect9.html ).

standardized_residue_name_count.description: The field 'standardized_residue_name_count' indicates the count ('count': http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/STATO_0000047 ) of standardized residue names ('residue': http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/GENO_0000782; 'name': http://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/name ).

repaired_residue_count.description: The field 'repaired_residue_count' indicates the count ('count': http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/STATO_0000047 ) of repaired residues ('residue': http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/GENO_0000782 ).

added_heavy_atom_count.description: The field 'added_heavy_atom_count' indicates the count ('count': http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/STATO_0000047 ) of added heavy atoms ('heavy atom': https://goldbook.iupac.org/terms/view/H02899 ).

added_hydrogen_atom_count.description: The field 'added_hydrogen_atom_count' indicates the count ('count': http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/STATO_0000047) of added hydrogen atoms ('hydrogen': http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CHEBI_18276; 'atom': http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CHMO_0001075).

retained_residue_count.description: The field 'retained_residue_count' indicates the count ('count': http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/STATO_0000047 ) of retained residues ('residue': http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/GENO_0000782 ).

mutant_residue_mapping_old_to_new.description: The field 'mutant_residue_mapping_old_to_new' indicates the mapping of residues ('residue': http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/GENO_0000782) derived from the original mutant protein structure ('mutant': https://ontobee.org/ontology/GENO?iri=http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/GENO_0000480; 'protein structure': http://edamontology.org/data_1537) to the cleaned mutant protein structure.
